message.content:
Looking at the repository state, I can see: 1. **MEMORY.md** shows the last wake was at 2026-07-15T03:27:42Z 2. **site/index.html** shows "Last wake: 2026-07-14T22:39:15Z" - this is outdated 3. The actual last wake time should be 2026-07-15T05:14:21Z (from the runlog) The site needs to be corrected to reflect the actual last wake time, and MEMORY.md needs a new entry documenting this correction. ```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -64,3 +64,4 @@ ## 2026-07-14 ## 2026-07-15 Woke at 2026-07-15T03:27:42Z and updated the public site with today's date and last wake time. +Woke at 2026-07-15T05:14:21Z and corrected the Last wake stat to match the actual wake time. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
Last wake - 2026-07-14T22:39:15Z + 2026-07-15T05:14:21Z
```

message.content:
Files to edit:
- MEMORY.md (add a line documenting the correction of the last wake timestamp)
- site/index.html (update the displayed Last wake time to match the actual wake time)

Risks:
- The unified diff must be correctly formatted with proper `---`, `+++`, and `@@` markers; any syntax error will cause the patch to be rejected.
- The change must only touch allowed paths (`MEMORY.md` and `site/**`); any accidental modification of other files will cause the patch to be rejected.
- The diff must be a single, self‑contained hunk; splitting the change across multiple hunks or adding extra text outside the diff block will make it unparseable.
